name: Rajesh Patel
message: We need bulk pricing for silicon mould release agents. Monthly requirement ~200 cans. Currently using competitor product but looking for better performance at injection moulding temperatures above 180C.

name: Vikram Sharma
message: Interested in becoming a dealer for Pune and Pimpri-Chinchwad region. We have existing relationships with 50+ manufacturing units in the area.

name: Ananya Krishnan
message: Looking for private label conformal coating solution. We manufacture PCBs for automotive ECUs and need IPC-CC-830 compliant coating. Volume: 5000 units/month. Can you do custom formulation with UV trace?

name: Mohammed Farooq
message: Need anti-spatter spray for our MIG welding line. Currently wasting too much time on spatter cleanup. Want to trial ceramic anti-spatter and silicon anti-spatter to compare.

name: Priya Mehta
message: I purchased the M.A.M.A Silicon Spray from your website. The nozzle seems to be clogged. How can I fix this? Order #MA-2024-0847.

name: Suresh Bhandari
message: We are an aerospace component manufacturer based in Mumbai. Need MIL-spec conformal coating for defence electronics. Volume: 500L/month. Require full compliance documentation and batch traceability.

name: Deepa Reddy
message: We distribute industrial chemicals across Hyderabad and Secunderabad. Interested in carrying your full S1000 and S2000 range. Currently serving 80+ factories in Telangana.

name: Kiran Deshmukh
message: Need pricing for Riders United chain lubricant and dashboard polish. We run 3 auto accessory shops in Nashik. Want to stock 50 units of each initially.

name: Anil Gupta
message: We use your non-silicon mould release agent but need something for high-temperature rubber moulding (250C+). Do you have a product for this? Monthly usage: 100 cans.

name: Neha Joshi
message: We're conducting research on conformal coating degradation under tropical conditions. Would like TDS and SDS for your Protektor range. Also interested in visiting your Sangamner facility for our students.

name: Ramesh Iyer
message: Evaluating conformal coating suppliers for our IoT device manufacturing line. Need samples of acrylic and polyurethane variants. Volume potential: 2000L/quarter.

name: Sanjay Patil
message: Want to order 500 cans of water-based anti-spatter. We've been using your ceramic anti-spatter but want to switch to water-based for environmental compliance. Please send revised pricing.
